rounds.howToPlay: Identify the Celebrity from the picture.

questions.info: Irish actor known for roles in films like In Bruges and the Harry Potter series.
Scottish actress best known for Doctor Who and Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy.
American television host and comedian famed for his long-running late-night shows.
American actress celebrated for her role as Joan Holloway in Mad Men.
British actor known for Homeland and Band of Brothers.
English actress best known for playing Rita Tanner in Coronation Street.
English actor who played Ron Weasley in the Harry Potter films.
British documentary presenter and Strictly Come Dancing winner.
Former British Prime Minister renowned for leading the UK during World War II.
American actress acclaimed for roles in Still Alice and Far From Heaven.
American filmmaker and former child actor known for Apollo 13 and A Beautiful Mind.
American actress and singer who rose to fame with films like Mean Girls.
Irish-German actor known for X-Men Shame and 12 Years a Slave.
American actress iconic for 1980s teen films like The Breakfast Club.
English cricketer and Test captain known for his explosive all-round performances.
Scottish actress best known for Downton Abbey and Game of Thrones.
English singer and Simply Red frontman famous for hits like “Holding Back the Years.”
Australian-American actress acclaimed for roles in Moulin Rouge! The Hours and Big Little Lies.
Former British Army officer known for his widely publicised affair with Princess Diana.
English gardening expert and TV presenter who rose to fame on Ground Force.
British long jumper and Olympic gold medallist from London 2012.
Australian actress known for Wedding Crashers Confessions of a Shopaholic and Now You See Me.
English Twitch streamer “AngryGinge” known for FIFA content and reality-TV appearances.
American actress celebrated for Zero Dark Thirty The Help and The Eyes of Tammy Faye.
Irish actor known for About Time Ex Machina and the Star Wars sequel trilogy.

rounds.howToPlay:
Identify the Musical Act from the Images.

A single letter in their name has been substituted for another.
The picture depicts the changed name.
Example: Muse would become Mute.

questions.info: Art-rock innovators who blended new wave funk and eccentric stagecraft under David Byrne.
American power-pop band known for huge hooks and a legendary live album recorded in Japan.
Rock ’n’ roll pioneer whose piano-driven hits shaped the sound of the 1950s.
British pop phenomenon who defined 90s girl power with global chart-topping hits.
American rock group famous for harmony-rich 70s radio staples.
Australian–New Zealand band led by Neil Finn known for melodic songwriting and soaring choruses.
Rock band founded by Dave Grohl delivering stadium anthems and relentless touring energy.
Politically charged rap-rock band known for explosive riffs and uncompromising activism.
British rock giants who fused blues folk and thunderous riffs into hugely influential music.
Manchester punk band celebrated for fast catchy songs and emotionally sharp lyrics.
Massively successful 90s boyband known for polished harmonies and global pop dominance.
Hard-rock superstars whose debut album delivered swagger chaos and genre-defining anthems.
British synth-pop duo mixing big hooks with surprisingly deep psychological themes.
American rock band blending hard rock and mysticism best known for cryptic classics.
Early boyband pioneers who sparked a global teen-pop craze in the late 80s.
Sheffield indie band who rose from MySpace fame to become major modern rock influencers.
Liverpool quartet whose songwriting and experimentation reshaped popular music forever.
Shock-rock trailblazer mixing theatrical horror glam and hard-rock showmanship.
Operatic rock singer famed for bombastic ballads and the epic Bat Out of Hell albums.
Manchester band who fused jangly guitars with dance rhythms to define the Madchester scene.
Provocative punk band whose brief chaotic career ignited a cultural revolution.
Long-running rock ’n’ roll institution built on blues swagger and relentless touring.
British hard-rock pioneers known for virtuosic musicianship and iconic riffs.
Politically charged punk band who expanded into reggae dub and rockabilly.
Post-punk icons whose stark sound and Ian Curtis’s haunting vocals left a lasting legacy.
